3889/* Module Configuration */
3890typedef struct ModuleConfig ModuleConfig;
3891int performModuleConfigSetFromName(sds name, sds value, const char **err);
3892int performModuleConfigSetDefaultFromName(sds name, const char **err);
3893void addModuleBoolConfig(sds name, sds alias, int flags, void *privdata, int default_val);
3894void addModuleStringConfig(sds name, sds alias, int flags, void *privdata, sds default_val);
3895void addModuleEnumConfig(sds name, sds alias, int flags, void *privdata, int default_val, configEnum *enum_vals, int num_enum_vals);
3896void addModuleNumericConfig(sds name, sds alias, int flags, void *privdata, long long default_val, int conf_flags, long long lower, long long upper);
3897void addModuleConfigApply(list *module_configs, ModuleConfig *module_config);
3898int moduleConfigApply(ModuleConfig *module_config, const char **err);
3899int moduleConfigApplyConfig(list *module_configs, const char **err, const char **err_arg_name);
3900int moduleConfigNeedsApply(ModuleConfig *config);
3901int getModuleBoolConfig(ModuleConfig *module_config);
3902int setModuleBoolConfig(ModuleConfig *config, int val, const char **err);
3903sds getModuleStringConfig(ModuleConfig *module_config);
3904int setModuleStringConfig(ModuleConfig *config, sds strval, const char **err);
3905int getModuleEnumConfig(ModuleConfig *module_config);
3906int setModuleEnumConfig(ModuleConfig *config, int val, const char **err);
3907long long getModuleNumericConfig(ModuleConfig *module_config);
3908int setModuleNumericConfig(ModuleConfig *config, long long val, const char **err);
3909
3910/* API for modules to access config values. */
3911dictIterator *moduleGetConfigIterator(void);
3912const char *moduleConfigIteratorNext(dictIterator **iter, sds pattern, int is_glob, configType *typehint);
3913int moduleGetConfigType(sds name, configType *res);
3914int moduleGetBoolConfig(sds name, int *res);
3915int moduleGetStringConfig(sds name, sds *res);
3916int moduleGetEnumConfig(sds name, sds *res);
3917int moduleGetNumericConfig(sds name, long long *res);
3918int moduleSetBoolConfig(client *c, sds name, int val, const char **err);
3919int moduleSetStringConfig(client *c, sds name, const char *val, const char **err);
3920int moduleSetEnumConfig(client *c, sds name, sds *vals, int vals_cnt, const char **err);
3921int moduleSetNumericConfig(client *c, sds name, long long val, const char **err);

3925void updateKeysizesHist(redisDb *db, uint32_t type, int64_t oldLen, int64_t newLen);
3926void updateSlotAllocSize(redisDb *db, int didx, kvobj *kv, int64_t oldsize, int64_t newsize);
3927void dbgRunAssertions(redisDb *db);
3928int removeExpire(redisDb *db, robj *key);
3929void deleteExpiredKeyAndPropagate(redisDb *db, robj *keyobj);
3930void deleteEvictedKeyAndPropagate(redisDb *db, robj *keyobj, long long *key_mem_freed);
3931void propagateDeletion(redisDb *db, robj *key, int lazy);
3932int keyIsExpired(redisDb *db, sds key, kvobj *kv);
3933int confAllowsExpireDel(void);
3934long long getExpire(redisDb *db, sds key, kvobj *kv);
3935kvobj *setExpire(client *c, redisDb *db, robj *key, long long when);
3936kvobj *setExpireByLink(client *c, redisDb *db, sds key, long long when, dictEntryLink link);
3937int checkAlreadyExpired(long long when);
3938int parseExtendedExpireArgumentsOrReply(client *c, int *flags);
3939kvobj *lookupKeyRead(redisDb *db, robj *key);
3940kvobj *lookupKeyWrite(redisDb *db, robj *key);
3941kvobj *lookupKeyWriteWithLink(redisDb *db, robj *key, dictEntryLink *link);
3942kvobj *lookupKeyReadOrReply(client *c, robj *key, robj *reply);
3943kvobj *lookupKeyWriteOrReply(client *c, robj *key, robj *reply);
3944kvobj *lookupKeyReadWithFlags(redisDb *db, robj *key, int flags);
3945kvobj *lookupKeyWriteWithFlags(redisDb *db, robj *key, int flags);
3946kvobj *kvobjCommandLookup(client *c, robj *key);
3947kvobj *kvobjCommandLookupOrReply(client *c, robj *key, robj *reply);
3948
3949#define LOOKUP_NONE 0
3950#define LOOKUP_NOTOUCH (1<<0) /* Don't update LRU. */
3951#define LOOKUP_NONOTIFY (1<<1) /* Don't trigger keyspace event on key misses. */
3952#define LOOKUP_NOSTATS (1<<2) /* Don't update keyspace hits/misses counters. */
3953#define LOOKUP_WRITE (1<<3) /* Delete expired keys even in replicas. */
3954#define LOOKUP_NOEXPIRE (1<<4) /* Avoid deleting lazy expired keys. */
3955#define LOOKUP_ACCESS_EXPIRED (1<<5) /* Allow lookup to expired key. */
3956#define LOOKUP_ACCESS_TRIMMED (1<<6) /* Allow lookup to key in slots being trimmed. */
3957#define LOOKUP_NOEFFECTS (LOOKUP_NONOTIFY | LOOKUP_NOSTATS | LOOKUP_NOTOUCH | LOOKUP_NOEXPIRE) /* Avoid any effects from fetching the key */
3958
3959static inline kvobj *dictGetKV(const dictEntry *de) {return (kvobj *) dictGetKey(de);}
3960kvobj *dbAdd(redisDb *db, robj *key, robj **valref);
3961kvobj *dbAddByLink(redisDb *db, robj *key, robj **valref, dictEntryLink *link);
3962kvobj *dbAddInternal(redisDb *db, robj *key, robj **valref, dictEntryLink *link, const KeyMetaSpec *m);
3963kvobj *dbAddRDBLoad(redisDb *db, sds key, robj **valref, const KeyMetaSpec *keyMetaSpec);
3964void dbReplaceValue(redisDb *db, robj *key, kvobj **ioKeyVal, int updateKeySizes);
3965void dbReplaceValueWithLink(redisDb *db, robj *key, robj **val, dictEntryLink link);

4508/* Log redaction helpers: return "*redacted*" when hide-user-data-from-log is on. */
4509static inline const char *redactLogCstr(const char *s) {
4510 return server.hide_user_data_from_log ? "*redacted*" : (s ? s : "(null)");
4511}
4512
4513/* Use macro for checking log level to avoid evaluating arguments in cases log
4514 * should be ignored due to low level. */
4515#define serverLog(level, ...) do {\
4516 if (((level)&0xff) < server.verbosity) break;\
4517 _serverLog(level, __VA_ARGS__);\
4518 } while(0)
4519
4520#define redisDebug(fmt, ...) \
4521 printf("DEBUG %s:%d > " fmt "\n", __FILE__, __LINE__, __VA_ARGS__)
4522#define redisDebugMark() \
4523 printf("-- MARK %s:%d --\n", __FILE__, __LINE__)
4524
4525int iAmMaster(void);
4526
4527#define STRINGIFY_(x) #x
4528#define STRINGIFY(x) STRINGIFY_(x)
4529
4530#endif
